name: Mega Man X
description: Capcom's futuristic Mega Man subseries starring X and Zero, adding faster movement, wall-climbing, dashing, and a darker sci-fi tone.

eras.title: SNES Era
eras.description: The original trilogy establishes the X formula on Super Nintendo.

eras.title: 32-bit Era
eras.description: PlayStation and Saturn entries expand the series with anime presentation, Zero-focused play, and larger stories.

eras.title: Late X Era
eras.description: Later entries continue the X timeline with mixed experimentation before the series becomes dormant.
